paragraphs.text: Data Science graduate with a strong background in statistical analysis, predictive modeling, and data visualization. Proven ability to streamline processes, enhance data accuracy, and deliver clear, actionable insights. Experienced project lead with strong communication, problem-solving, and collaboration skills.
